name: mlx-pretraining
description: Small GPT pretraining on Apple Silicon with MLX backend
context: Small GPT pretraining experiment on Apple M4 Max. Exploring model architecture, optimizer, and hyperparameter choices to minimize validation loss under a fixed 5-minute compute budget.
goals: Minimize val_bpb (validation bits-per-byte). Everything in train.py is fair game: architecture, optimizer, hyperparameters, batch size, model size.
